demo_timestamps.description: Set up the three core components of an MCP system: host (VS Code with Copilot), brain (MCP client), hand (MCP server)
Add a get weather tool that calls an external weather API
Implement list buckets and create bucket with two-legged auth
Add user-level authentication with three-legged auth and create get user info tool
Build your own MCP client and wire in an LLM

themes: Building an MCP system using Autodesk APS

ai_technologies.name: Copilot
ai_technologies.context: Assists with coding tasks in VS Code

summary: The video is part of the MCP Workshop series on building an MCP system integrating data, AI, API, and Autodesk Platform Services (APS). It demonstrates setting up components like VS Code with Copilot, and implementing features like external API calls, user authentication, and LLM-powered reasoning. The workshop concludes with instructions on building customized MCP clients and incorporating an agentic loop.
